mapper.insert: INSERT INTO idempotency_key (merchant_id, key, request_hash) VALUES (#{merchantId}, #{key}, #{requestHash}) ON CONFLICT (merchant_id, key) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT merchant_id AS "merchantId", key, request_hash AS "requestHash", response_status AS "responseStatus", response_body::text AS "responseBody", created_at AS "createdAt", completed_at AS "completedAt" FROM idempotency_key WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND key = #{key}
mapper.update: UPDATE idempotency_key SET response_status = #{status}, response_body = #{body}::jsonb, completed_at = now() WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND key = #{key}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM idempotency_key WHERE created_at < now() - make_interval(secs := #{seconds})
